title: What are the odds?
description: Play the 'What are the odds?' game in Minecraft
body:
# What Are the Odds
This is an implementation of the What Are the Odds? Game as a Fabric server-side mod.
An informal description of the games rules can be found here:
[https://what-are-the-odds.info/](https://what-are-the-odds.info/)

## Usage
Challenge a player to a game with:
```
/odds challenge <player name> <text of the odds>
```

The other player can respond with
```
/odds respond <number>
```

Then both players write their guesses in the chat and the mod checks it.
